venues.name: North 54
venues.description: Modern twist on classic banh mi from rising star Bac Pham (ex-Rockpool, Petition). 10-inch house-recipe rolls with playful fillings taking Perth by storm.
venues.mustTry: Grilled lamb meatballs with cumin labneh, son-in-law eggs with tamarind mayo, roast pork with fermented red bean

venues.name: Smidge Bakery
venues.description: Self-proclaimed "Perth's best cinny scrolls" — and they might be right. Selling an average of 20 trays daily since moving to new Leederville location.
venues.mustTry: Cinnamon scrolls (sold 15 trays first week!), choc caramel brownies, salted Caramilk cookies, sangas

venues.name: Lovers Deli & Canteen
venues.description: Nostalgia-driven cafe serving a contender for Perth's best chicken schnitty. Old-school charm with timber veneer, chrome counters, and plush banquette seats.
venues.mustTry: Chicken schnitzel (brown butter, capers, lemon-herb sauce), "green eggs and scram" with parsley sauce, blood pudding egg muffin

venues.name: Be Free
venues.description: Cult Subiaco favorite relocated to greener pastures. Surrounded by community gardens, the produce-driven ethos feels more relevant than ever.
venues.mustTry: Umami-forward miso mushrooms, wild-caught smoked salmon crumpets, Saturday farmer's market-sourced dishes

venues.name: Side Piece Deli
venues.description: From the Daisies and Other Side legends. Perth's sandwich elite just got a new member with globally-inspired creations that are gagging the city.
venues.mustTry: Tomago or fish katsu sando on shokupan, mortadella and labneh focaccia, onion bhaji focaccia, Keralaan fried chicken with kasundi aioli

venues.name: Banh Mi & Chè
venues.description: Kelly Vo's dessert store from Nha Trang comes to Perth. Selling basically two things: banh mi and chè (Vietnamese dessert soup) — and doing both perfectly.
venues.mustTry: Chè (dessert soup with taro, flan, jelly, coconut milk), xoi man (sticky Vietnamese rice), banh trang tron rice paper salad

venues.name: The Cool Room
venues.description: Beloved Freo spot now in the hands of chef Drew Dawson and baker Charlotte Beeton. Short, curated menu that delights without overwhelming.
venues.mustTry: Scandi breakfast plates, house-baked treats, chef-driven seasonal menu

venues.name: Angelwood Pies
venues.description: Grab-and-go pie shop with a chef who has Michelin approval. Selling out by midday with "fine-dining pies" that redefine the category.
venues.mustTry: Fine-dining pies (varieties change), get there before midday!

venues.name: Bert's
venues.description: Day-to-night diner in the old Odyssea space. Laid-back coastal look with contemporary edge, creating the perfect "local" vibe for beachgoers.
venues.mustTry: Breakfast classics (acai, breakfast burger, pancakes, eggs Benedict), oysters, prawn and lobster plates

venues.name: Earl's
venues.description: Filling Mount Hawthorn's lunchtime gap with serious sangas. Hoagies, French dips, and classic American-style sandwiches done right.
venues.mustTry: Hoagies, French dip sandwiches, classic deli fare
